title: rytidosperma exiguum
intro: Rytidosperma exiguum, also known as slender wallaby grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Rytidosperma exiguum is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be used in herbal remedies, and its leaves can also be used to make a poultice for topical application.
